action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval=457.79, training overfits severely. SWA model gets ~474 z500_rmse, regular best ~462. Analysis: Need different architecture with better inductive bias. Decision: Try FNO (Fourier Neural Operator) which is well-suited for weather prediction on periodic grids. Also try ensemble approach. First submit current checkpoint, then build FNO.
